motionPhilosophy: This dynamic-pop motion profile is designed to create a visually engaging and responsive experience for the alarm-check icon. The icon's complex geometry and symmetry are emphasized through subtle, yet impactful animations that mimic real-world interactions such as vibrations and sound ripples. The hover animation adds a touch of flair with a focus flare effect, while the click animation includes pop-explosion motion and vibration to simulate a physical button press.
